_comment: v13: bump cosine cross-entropy temperature from INV_TEMP=10 to INV_TEMP=30. v12 cleanly trained xent (8.16 -> 7.38 nats) but plateaued 5.6 nats above the theoretical floor at INV_TEMP=10 (~1.77). At INV_TEMP=30 the softmax sharpens and the floor drops to ~0.59 nats — gradient signal per token is much stronger when the model is wrong. Single-variable test, all other hyperparameters identical to v12_xent. Architecture and corpus frozen at v11/v12 (controls). If v13 still produces word salad, the loss-temperature path is exhausted and the next move is corpus expansion at 10-20x scale (smol-smoltalk subsample).
